de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser

Class KeYParserBaseListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYParserBaseListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KeYParserListener, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener

    public class KeYParserBaseListener
extends java.lang.Object
implements KeYParserListener
    This class provides an empty implementation of KeYParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      KeYParserBaseListener()
